attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
RULE.ACCOUNT_NO, 
RULE.COMPANY_CODE,
RULE.CREATED_BY, 
RULE.CREATION_DATE,
RULE.DEPARTMENT, 
RULE.DEST_CURRENCY_CODE,
RULE.DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, 
RULE.DIST_TYPE,
RULE.END_PERIOD_NUM, 
RULE.END_PERIOD_YEAR,
RULE.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
RULE.GLOBAL_NAME,
RULE.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
RULE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
RULE.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
RULE.LOCATION,
RULE.ORG_ID, 
RULE.PERCENTAGE,
RULE.PROJECT,
RULE.RULE_ID,
RULE.RULE_NAME, 
RULE.SEQUENCE_NUMBER,
RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM, 
RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR,
RULE.SUBACCOUNT, 
RULE.THEATRE,
RULE.BATCH_ID,
RULE.CREATE_DATETIME,
RULE.ACTION_CODE, 
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM	
$$STGDB.ST_OM_CFI_2TIER_RULES_ALL RULE
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
WHERE RULE.ORG_ID=COU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='CISCO')

OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
WHERE RULE.DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT)

OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
WHERE NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM
AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR
AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year')

OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFA
WHERE NFA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND TRIM(NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE)=TRIM(RULE.ACCOUNT_NO))

SELECT	
RULE.ACCOUNT_NO AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE AS BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR AS BK_START_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM AS BK_START_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(RULE.THEATRE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CFI_THEATER_NAME,
RULE.DIST_TYPE AS DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(RULE.RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS TWO_TIER_RULE_NAME,
RULE.PERCENTAGE AS RESERVE_PERCENT_RT,
OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
COU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
COALESCE(RULE.END_PERIOD_YEAR,3500) AS END_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(RULE.END_PERIOD_NUM,99) AS END_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT,
RULE.RULE_ID AS SK_RULE_ID_INT,
CASE	
	WHEN	RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC'
	WHEN	RULE.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV'
END	AS SS_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_OM_CFI_2TIER_RULES_ALL RULE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
	ON	RULE.ORG_ID=COU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND	COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
	AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='CISCO'
INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
	ON	RULE.DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	ON	NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM
	AND	NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR
	AND	NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFIS
	ON	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=RULE.END_PERIOD_NUM
	AND	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=RULE.END_PERIOD_YEAR
	AND	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFA
	ON	NFA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
	AND	TRIM(NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE)=TRIM(RULE.ACCOUNT_NO)
WHERE	RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO'
	AND	RULE.THEATRE IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_AR_TRX_2TIER_RULE RL WHERE 
RL.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = RULE.ACCOUNT_NO
AND RL.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD = NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE
AND RL.BK_START_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT = RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR
AND RL.BK_START_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT = RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM
AND RL.BK_CFI_THEATER_NAME = COALESCE(RULE.THEATRE,'UNKNOWN'))	
UNION ALL
SELECT	
RULE.ACCOUNT_NO AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE AS BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR AS BK_START_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM AS BK_START_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(RULE.THEATRE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CFI_THEATER_NAME,
RULE.DIST_TYPE AS DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(RULE.RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS TWO_TIER_RULE_NAME,
RULE.PERCENTAGE AS RESERVE_PERCENT_RT,
OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
COU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
COALESCE(RULE.END_PERIOD_YEAR,3500) AS END_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(RULE.END_PERIOD_NUM,99) AS END_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT,
RULE.RULE_ID AS SK_RULE_ID_INT,
CASE	
	WHEN	RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC'
	WHEN	RULE.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV'
END	AS SS_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_CFI_2TIER_RULES_ALL RULE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
	ON	RULE.ORG_ID=COU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND	COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
	AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='CISCO'
INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
	ON	RULE.DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	ON	NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM
	AND	NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR
	AND	NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFIS
	ON	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=RULE.END_PERIOD_NUM
	AND	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=RULE.END_PERIOD_YEAR
	AND	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFA
	ON	NFA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
	AND	TRIM(NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE)=TRIM(RULE.ACCOUNT_NO)
WHERE	RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO'
	AND	RULE.THEATRE IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_AR_TRX_2TIER_RULE RL WHERE 
RL.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = RULE.ACCOUNT_NO
AND RL.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD = NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE
AND RL.BK_START_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT = RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR
AND RL.BK_START_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT = RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM
AND RL.BK_CFI_THEATER_NAME = COALESCE(RULE.THEATRE,'UNKNOWN'))

SELECT	SCXR.BATCH_ID, 
        SCXR.APPLICATION_NAME,
		SCXR.APPLICATION_ID, 
		SCXR.RULE_ID,
		SCXR.ORG_ID, 
		SCXR.START_PERIOD_YEAR,
		SCXR.END_PERIOD_YEAR, 
		SCXR.START_PERIOD_NUM,
		SCXR.END_PERIOD_NUM, 
		SCXR.DIST_TYPE,
		SCXR.THEATRE, 
		SCXR.SEQUENCE_NUMBER,
		SCXR.PERCENTAGE, 
		SCXR.ACCOUNT_1,
		SCXR.DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, 
		SCXR.DEST_CURRENCY_CODE,
		SCXR.COMPANY_CODE, 
		SCXR.DEPARTMENT,
		SCXR.LOCATION, 
		SCXR.SUBACCOUNT,
		SCXR.PROJECT, 
		SCXR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		SCXR.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
		SCXR.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
		SCXR.CREATION_DATE, 
		SCXR.CREATED_BY,
		SCXR.ELEMENT_TYPE, 
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE1,
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE2, 
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE3,
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE4, 
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE5,
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE6, 
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE7,
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE8, 
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE9,
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE10, 
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE11,
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE12, 
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE13,
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE14, 
		SCXR.ATTRIBUTE15,
		SCXR.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
		SCXR.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SCXR.CREATE_DATETIME, 
		SCXR.ACTION_CODE,
		'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
        		
FROM	
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_RULES_ALL SCXR
 WHERE 
 NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
WHERE SCXR.ORG_ID=COU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='CISCO')
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
WHERE SCXR.DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFA
WHERE NFA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND TRIM(NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE)=TRIM(SCXR.ACCOUNT_1)
)

SELECT	
RULE.ACCOUNT_1 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_1_CD,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE AS BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR AS BK_START_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM AS BK_START_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(RULE.THEATRE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CFI_THEATER_NAME,
RULE.DIST_TYPE AS DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(RULE.DIST_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS TWO_TIER_DIST_TYPE,
RULE.PERCENTAGE AS RESERVE_PERCENT_RT,
OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
COU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
COALESCE(RULE.END_PERIOD_YEAR,3500) AS END_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(RULE.END_PERIOD_NUM,99) AS END_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT,
RULE.RULE_ID AS SK_RULE_ID_INT,
'CG' AS SS_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_RULES_ALL RULE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
	ON	RULE.ORG_ID=COU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND	COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
	AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='CISCO'
INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
	ON	RULE.DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	ON	NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM
	AND	NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR
	AND	NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFIS
	ON	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=RULE.END_PERIOD_NUM
	AND	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=RULE.END_PERIOD_YEAR
	AND	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFA
	ON	NFA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
	AND	TRIM(NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE)=TRIM(RULE.ACCOUNT_1)
WHERE RULE.THEATRE IS NOT NULL
/*AND RULE.DEST_LEDGER_ID IN ( SELECT LEDGER_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER )*/


UNION
 ALL

SELECT	
RULE.ACCOUNT_1 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE AS BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR AS BK_START_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM AS BK_START_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(RULE.THEATRE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CFI_THEATER_NAME,
RULE.DIST_TYPE AS DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(RULE.DIST_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS TWO_TIER_DIST_TYPE,
RULE.PERCENTAGE AS RESERVE_PERCENT_RT,
OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
COU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
COALESCE(RULE.END_PERIOD_YEAR,3500) AS END_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(RULE.END_PERIOD_NUM,99) AS END_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT,
RULE.RULE_ID AS SK_RULE_ID_INT,
'CG' AS SS_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_RULES_ALL RULE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
	ON	RULE.ORG_ID=COU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND	COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
	AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='CISCO'
INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
	ON	RULE.DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	ON	NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=RULE.START_PERIOD_NUM
	AND	NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=RULE.START_PERIOD_YEAR
	AND	NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFIS
	ON	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=RULE.END_PERIOD_NUM
	AND	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=RULE.END_PERIOD_YEAR
	AND	NFIS.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFA
	ON	NFA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
	AND	TRIM(NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE)=TRIM(RULE.ACCOUNT_1)
WHERE RULE.THEATRE IS NOT NULL
/*AND RULE.DEST_LEDGER_ID IN ( SELECT LEDGER_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER )*/
